source_pr.title: ddl: init global vars from system tables before start domain
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #54868, close #54860

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?
as title, see this for root cause https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/54868#issuecomment-2249663873
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test, only fix existing ones, should cover it
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

bootstrap with TiKV, test some ddl/dml, they should work and check no error logs.
bootstrap with unistore, same test as above.

- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: query = `select (select group_concat(column_name) from information_schema.columns where table_name='tidb_global_task' order by ordinal_position) (pkg/session/bootstrap_test.go)
failure_signature: query = `select (select group_concat(column_name) from information_schema.columns where table_name='tidb_global_task' order by ordinal_position) (pkg/session/bootstrap_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to classify this as a flaky-test stabilization from the available case data. This PR primarily refactors domain/session bootstrap ordering (split `Domain.Init` vs `Domain.Start`, and initialize required global variables from system tables before starting domain loops/DDL) to fix bootstrap/runtime issues; treat as a low-confidence/unclear flaky-fix signal.
fix_pattern: Refactor bootstrap ordering: initialize required global variables from system tables before starting domain loops/DDL (split `Domain.Init` and `Domain.Start`) to avoid ordering/race issues during bootstrap.

evidence: evidence: query = `select (select group_concat(column_name) from information_schema.columns where table_name='tidb_global_task' order by ordinal_position) (pkg/session/bootstrap_test.go)

files: pkg/domain/domain.go, pkg/domain/domain_test.go, pkg/expression/context/context.go, pkg/session/bootstrap_test.go, pkg/session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go, pkg/session/session.go, pkg/session/tidb.go
